root_cause: Profile validation could expose the Begin Business Assessment action directly, while checkout buttons were not gated by validated Profile ID.
repair_summary: Business Assessment actions now require validated Profile ID first; Dev Code access requires validated Profile ID plus valid Dev Code; Monthly Intelligence requires validated Profile ID plus completed Business Assessment.

panel_1_profile_gate.instruction: First validate your profile to unlock Business Assessment checkout.

panel_2_profile_gate.instruction: First validate your profile to unlock Monthly Intelligence.

combined_profile_plus_dev_code_rule: Free Business Assessment access requires validated Profile ID plus valid Dev Code.
monthly_intelligence_ba_completion_rule: Monthly Intelligence checkout remains disabled unless the existing retrieval path confirms completed Business Assessment output.
checkout_profile_id_preservation: Existing checkout route already accepts profile_id, uses it as client_reference_id, and stores it in Stripe metadata; no backend change required.
production_smoke_plan: initial page shows three premium panels
Panel 1 checkout disabled before Profile ID validation
Panel 2 Monthly Intelligence disabled before Profile ID validation and BA completion
Profile ID validation alone does not start test
validated Profile ID plus BA5FREE unlocks Begin Business Assessment
active question view remains clean after begin
limits: No Stripe price or product changes
Live browser retest recommended with known valid Profile ID and BA5FREE
